name: io.github.Efistoffeles/letsfg
title: LetsFG
description: Flight search & booking for AI agents. 400+ airlines, 195 local connectors. Rate limited: 10 searches/min. letsfg.co

environmentVariables.description: Your LetsFG API key (optional — search works without it via cloud backend. API key needed for unlock/book).
environmentVariables.name: LETSFG_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Search mode: 'cloud' (default, recommended) or 'local' (requires Python + Playwright)
environmentVariables.name: LETSFG_SEARCH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Your LetsFG API key (optional — search works without it via cloud backend. API key needed for unlock/book).
environmentVariables.name: LETSFG_API_KEY
